description:
A missing person's Search and Rescue (SAR) operation is underway. You have received an image of their secondary GPS logger device (/home/ga/evidence/gps_logger.dd). Time is critical.

Perform a forensic analysis of the disk image in Autopsy by creating a case named 'SAR_GPS_2024' (case number 'INV-SAR-008'). Export the extracted GPS trackpoints to /home/ga/Reports/trackpoints_export.csv. Identify the trackpoint with the latest timestamp and record the findings in /home/ga/Reports/SAR_Report.txt using the following format:

SAR GPS ANALYSIS REPORT
=======================
CASE: SAR_GPS_2024
TOTAL_TRACKPOINTS: <number>
LATEST_TIMESTAMP: <timestamp>
LAST_KNOWN_LATITUDE: <decimal degrees>
LAST_KNOWN_LONGITUDE: <decimal degrees>
